idea-plugin.name: Branch Commit Formatter
idea-plugin.description:
Automatically formats Git branch names into structured commit messages.

Converts branch names like feature/ABC-1234_Add_function_comment into commit messages like [ABC-1234] Add function comment.

Features:
  • Auto-fills commit message when opening the commit dialog (if empty)
  • Manual action "Format Branch to Commit Message" available in VCS menu
  • Supports branch prefixes: feature/, bugfix/, hotfix/, or no prefix
  • Customizable regex pattern and output format via Settings
  • Live preview to test your pattern configuration
  • Enable/disable toggle

action.description: Formats the current Git branch name into a structured commit message
